top_signals.title: US Tech Stocks Set to Rally as Micron Outlook Fuels AI Optimism
top_signals.summary: US stock futures jumped as Micron Technology Inc.’s solid forecast reinforced confidence about demand for artificial intelligence-related chips.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jamieson Wellness Explores Selling Itself, Taps BMO and Canaccord to Advise
top_signals.summary: Jamieson Wellness Inc., the Canadian vitamins and supplements maker, is working with Bank of Montreal and Canaccord Genuity Group Inc. to explore a sale.
